memberdef.name: AES_BLOCK_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 16 /* AES operates on 16 bytes at a time */

briefdescription.para: This function substitutes a word using the AES S-Box.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 Key[], u32 W[], int KeySizeBits)
memberdef.name: AesKeySetup

briefdescription.para: Performs the action of generating the keys that will be used in every round of encryption.

parameterdescription.para: is the length in bits of "Key", must be 128, 192, or 256.

detaileddescription.para: Each round has its own pre-generated 16-byte key in the form of 4 integers W. Each integer is XOR'd by one column of the state. Also performs the job of InvAddRoundKey(); since the function is a simple XOR process, it is its own inverse.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion

detaileddescription.para: All bytes in the State are substituted with a pre-calculated value from a lookup table.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion.

briefdescription.para: This function Performs the inverted substates step.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion

briefdescription.para: This function erforms the ShiftRows step.

detaileddescription.para: All rows are shifted cylindrically to the left.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion.

briefdescription.para: All rows are shifted cylindrically to the right.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion.

briefdescription.para: This function Performs the MixColums step.

detaileddescription.para: The State is multiplied by itself using matrix multiplication in a Galios Field 2^8. All multiplication is pre-computed in a table. Addition is equivalent to XOR. (Must always make a copy of the column as the original values will be destroyed.)

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion.

briefdescription.para: This function Performs the the inverted MixColums step.

parameterdescription.para: are the statevalues of the AES conversion.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 In[], u8 Out[], const u32 Key[], int KeySize)
memberdef.name: AesEncrypt

briefdescription.para: This function encrypts using AES encryption.

parameterdescription.para: is the bit length of the key, 128, 192, or 256

simplesect.para: Key setup must be done before any AES en/de-cryption functions can be used.

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 In[], u8 Out[], const u32 Key[], int KeySize)
memberdef.name: AesDecrypt

parameterdescription.para: is the bit length of the key, 128, 192, or 256

simplesect.para: Key setup must be done before any AES en/de-cryption functions can be used.

briefdescription.para: This function encrypts 128 bits data with a key of size 128 bits.

parameterdescription.para: is the user supplied input key

briefdescription.para: This function encrypts 128 bits data with a key of size 128 bits.

parameterdescription.para: is the user supplied input key

briefdescription.para: This code is the implementation of the AES algorithm and the CTR, CBC, and CCM modes of operation it can be used in.

detaileddescription.para:
AES is, specified by the NIST in in publication FIPS PUB 197, available at:
http://csrc.nist.gov/publications/fips/fips197/fips-197.pdf . The CBC and CTR modes of operation are specified by NIST SP 800-38 A, available at:
http://csrc.nist.gov/publications/nistpubs/800-38a/sp800-38a.pdf . The CCM mode of operation is specified by NIST SP80-38 C, available at:
http://csrc.nist.gov/publications/nistpubs/800-38C/SP800-38C_updated-July20_2007.pdf

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 MH 10/30/15 First Release 1.01 MH 01/28/17 Fixed warnings and errors.
